title: Microsoft calls for $190 billion in 2026 capital spending on soaring memory prices
summary_full: Microsoft's forecast on revenue and operating margin was light, but the company sees $190 billion in 2026 capital spending, well above Wall Street's estimate.
summary_public: Microsoft's forecast on revenue and operating margin was light, but the company sees $190 billion in 2026 capital spending, well above Wall Street's estimate.
